subject: Ahrefs CSV needed — rank tracker runs in 24 hours
body:
The rank tracker is scheduled to run in 24 hours (Monday 07:00 UTC).

No file currently uploaded.

To upload a fresh Ahrefs export:
1. Ahrefs Site Explorer → Overview → Export CSV
2. Upload at: http://localhost:4242 (Optimize tab → Actions → Upload Ahrefs CSV)

Next week outlook: **Forward-Looking Assessment:**

With zero spend, clicks, and conversions this week—and no changes applied—the account is effectively dormant, meaning next week will yield the same results unless action is taken. **The single most important priority is diagnosing why the account is inactive** (paused campaigns, exhausted budgets, billing issues, or disapproved ads) and resolving it immediately to avoid continued lost opportunity. Until spend resumes, there is no performance data to optimize against.
